home.title: Ship with fortune, read with clarity

home.composerHint: Ask for the next clear step...

quickActions.title: Explore code
quickActions.prompt: Explore this codebase and summarize the key modules, data flow, and safest next step.

quickActions.title: Build carefully
quickActions.prompt: Implement this feature in small, reviewable steps and verify the core behavior.

quickActions.title: Review diffs
quickActions.prompt: Review the current diff and prioritize bugs, regressions, missing tests, and privacy risks.

quickActions.title: Restore safely
quickActions.prompt: Inspect the theme or UI change, explain how to restore the previous state, and avoid private screenshots.
